content: Kubernetes ConfigMap data is capped at 1 MiB (data + binaryData combined; documented in k8s ConfigMap concepts docs; underlying etcd request limit ~1.5MiB). Fine for TIDE planning artifacts (MILESTONE.md/PLAN.md typically 5-50 KiB); guard/truncate near ~900KiB. Per-project RWO PVC reader Jobs are the alternative but add pod-startup latency and RWO attach-conflict risk on multi-node clusters.
